SEARCH
Package ru.nsu.krasnyanskii.snake.model.board

Interface BoardBounds

All Known Implementing Classes:
SolidWallBounds, WrapAroundBounds
public interface BoardBounds
Strategy for what happens when the snake reaches a board edge.

Two built-in implementations are provided: SolidWallBounds (classic: hitting a wall kills the snake) and WrapAroundBounds (toroidal: the snake exits one side and enters the opposite).

Adding a third boundary rule (e.g. bouncing) requires only a new implementation of this interface — no changes to GameModel are needed (open/closed principle).

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Point
    apply(Point point)
    Wraps or validates point according to this boundary rule.

  • Method Details

    • apply

      Point apply(Point point)
      Wraps or validates point according to this boundary rule.
      Parameters:
      point - the candidate position after one movement step
      Returns:
      the effective position the snake should occupy, or null if the move is fatal (i.e. the snake hits a solid wall)
